# Design tokens

CSS custom properties from `src/tokens/`. Use with `var(--velin-*, fallback)`.

See also: [`examples/tokens.full.json`](../../examples/tokens.full.json) for JSON `tokens build` input.

| Category | Variables | Reference |
| --- | --- | --- |
| aspect-ratio | 6 | [aspect-ratio.md](./aspect-ratio.md) |
| color | 112 | [color.md](./color.md) |
| fonts | 6 | [fonts.md](./fonts.md) |
| motion | 22 | [motion.md](./motion.md) |
| radius | 9 | [radius.md](./radius.md) |
| shadow | 15 | [shadow.md](./shadow.md) |
| spacing | 18 | [spacing.md](./spacing.md) |
| typography | 33 | [typography.md](./typography.md) |
| z-index | 11 | [z-index.md](./z-index.md) |
